response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with genuine geospatial domain exposure through his GISCollective/Green Map work and real low-latency systems experience writing DLang services handling millions of requests per second. However, the role's core requirement is modern C++ (or Rust) in commercial settings, and his C/C++ experience is brief and dated (a seven-month stint in 2014-2015 plus a thesis project); his recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node web and product work. He also has no routing, tiling, or navigation guidance experience, so he would face a significant ramp on both the primary language and the domain.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS experience via GISCollective, Green Map, and a FOSS4G talk
Proven low-latency systems work in DLang (async I/O, fibers, caching) at high request volumes
Broad, adaptable stack experience with strong testing and craftsmanship practices
concerns: Modern C++/Rust experience is minimal and roughly a decade old
No routing, map tiling, or navigation guidance system background
Recent roles (Stripe, Shopify, RIDE) are TypeScript/web product work, far from data-pipeline systems engineering
